CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jason Wolford, Esq., (415)524-4853 for Plaintiff/Moving Party Mary Amen

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard no oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MARY AMEN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute Representative Of Estate For Deceased Defendant [Edward Rogers] (C.C.P. 377.41) is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
